metadata.name: Assign a Trailer to a Tractor

description: A driver needs to pick up a pre-loaded trailer from a yard. A dispatcher must assign the specific trailer to the driver's tractor.

nodes.task_description: The dispatcher identifies the load the driver is scheduled to pick up.

expected_outcome.value: The correct load record is found.

nodes.task_description: The system shows which trailer has been pre-loaded with that load.

expected_outcome.value: The dispatcher identifies the correct trailer number.

nodes.task_description: The dispatcher creates a 'hook' event in the system, linking the driver's tractor ID with the trailer ID.

expected_outcome.value: The tractor and trailer are now linked in the system.

nodes.task_description: The driver is notified of the specific trailer number and its location in the yard.

expected_outcome.value: The driver knows which trailer to pick up.
